name: oh-my-gjc
description: oh-my-gajaecode — focused Gajae Code suite with 9 skills and 12 commands. Skills: adaptive-response, no-english, time-left, extragoal, insane-review, lazycodex-gjc, deep-onboarding, session-observer, preset-fit. Commands: /omg, /omg:setup, /omg:gate, /omg:gate-always, /omg:no-english, /omg:time-left, /omg:fable, /omg:insane-review, /omg:lazycodex-gjc, /omg:deep-onboarding, /omg:session-observer, /omg:preset-fit. The session-observer runner is explicit-only, token-free, JSONL-based, and read-only; its slash launcher spends one launch turn and returns no observed text. Deep onboarding analyzes first, interviews for missing context, and writes project-map/ADR/handoff documents only to an explicitly confirmed output path. Preset-fit measures the task's relevant file set with pinned repomix in a temp dir and recommends a builtin model preset plus relaunch command; it never edits models.yml or config.yml. models.yml remains untouched.
